---
title: "Tools"
page-layout: full
description: "Interactive decision-support and economic-evaluation tools developed by Mesfin Genie."
---

::: {.page-header}
::: {.page-shell}
# Tools

Interactive applications translating empirical research into transparent policy and economic analysis.
:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.page-shell}
::: {.tool-showcase}
::: {.tool-showcase-copy}
<div class="tool-kicker">Version 18 · Vaccine policy</div>

## eMANDEVA Decision Aid

The eMANDEVA Decision Aid combines discrete-choice evidence with policy scenarios to assess prospective vaccine-mandate designs.

- Expected public support
- Lives saved and health benefits
- Benefit-cost outcomes
- Policy-design trade-offs and traffic-light summaries

<a class="tool-link" data-open-new="true" href="https://mesfingenie.com/eMANDEVA-DecisionAid-V18/">Launch eMANDEVA <i class="bi bi-arrow-up-right"></i></a>
:::

::: {.tool-preview aria-label="Illustrative eMANDEVA outputs"}
<div class="preview-heading">Policy scenario</div>
<div class="preview-metric"><span>Expected support</span><strong>68%</strong></div>
<div class="preview-bar"><span style="width:68%"></span></div>
<div class="preview-metric"><span>Lives saved</span><strong>High</strong></div>
<div class="preview-metric"><span>Benefit-cost assessment</span><strong>Positive</strong></div>
:::
:::

::: {.tool-showcase}
::: {.tool-showcase-copy}
<div class="tool-kicker">Version 18 · Farm economics</div>

## Farming BCA Tool

The Farming BCA Tool evaluates farm practices and soil-management interventions under alternative assumptions and sensitivity scenarios.

- Net present value
- Benefit-cost ratio
- Gross profit margin and return on investment
- Discount-rate and cost-benefit sensitivity analysis

<a class="tool-link" data-open-new="true" href="https://mesfingenie.com/farming-bca-tool-v18/">Launch Farming BCA Tool <i class="bi bi-arrow-up-right"></i></a>
:::

::: {.tool-preview aria-label="Illustrative Farming BCA Tool outputs"}
<div class="preview-heading">Practice comparison</div>
<div class="preview-metric"><span>Net present value</span><strong>A$/ha</strong></div>
<div class="preview-metric"><span>Benefit-cost ratio</span><strong>BCR</strong></div>
<div class="preview-metric"><span>Return on investment</span><strong>ROI</strong></div>
<div class="preview-chart"><i></i><i></i><i></i><i></i></div>
:::
:::
:::
:::
